Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment Against Defendant
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vivian Leung Lerche, esq. (415-680-5731) specially appearing for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK's Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment Against Defendant Pursuant to CCP 664.6 is Granted. No opposition filed.

Order and judgment are signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
